testcase.name: App UI regression (RTL) > renders version link to test report and updated footer year
App UI regression (RTL) > shows ENTER ROOM overlay and calls audio bootstrap on click
App UI regression (RTL) > opens and closes the Music panel from icon click and outside click
App UI regression (RTL) > propagates music setting changes to audioService.updateMusicSettings
audio source pool > uses synth when it is the only source
audio source pool > returns null when no source is available and synth is disabled
audio source pool > cycles through mixed sources in round-robin order
audio source pool > supports slot search and slot clear operations
audio source pool > re-enables synth when switching to SYNTH mode
audio interactions > clamps wet controls and lofi params
audio interactions > builds constrained intervals for drone scales
Mixer UI (RTL) > calls transport callbacks on play/stop click
Mixer UI (RTL) > toggles synth source from data section
Mixer UI (RTL) > loads sample files from hidden input change
Mixer UI (RTL) > toggles LO-FI from cassette switch
music scales > falls back to default scale
music scales > keeps normalized pitch-class intervals
quantize > respects nearest/down/up and no repeat
quantize > supports noThirds and leading-tone penalty
quantize > falls back to root for non-finite input
notes helpers > maps pitch classes and note names
notes helpers > converts midi and frequency safely
notes helpers > snaps midi to target pitch class
